notes: This expanded compilation draws from documented on-the-ground activity across major protest waves (2020 BLM/Portland, campus actions, recent anti-ICE & political events). Many operate independently with donation or self-funding models. Platforms evolve; some use multiple or cross-post. Anonymous or short-term accounts are common on TikTok LIVE. Always verify current handles. TG/Discord: config-driven channels for event coordination (see chat monitor).
